hero.headline: CRAFTING THE
hero.description: Architecture for the digital age. We translate complex engineering into fluid, human-centric interfaces that drive meaningful impact and global reach.

sections.methodologyDesc: We don't just hide technical complexity—we celebrate it. Our designs use technical metadata as decorative motifs to establish authority and transparency.

aiSection.headline: WE ARE SHAPING
aiSection.description: At Mermez Lab, we are not just AI users—we are supporters, providers, and specialists in engineering intelligent systems. We integrate AI at the core of our projects to deliver solutions beyond boundaries.
aiSection.manifesto: AI-First Vision: We believe the future is built on data and machine learning. We are here to lead this transformation and empower businesses with sovereign and private AI tools.

rehalaty.title: REHALATY - Global Travel Platform
rehalaty.challenge: Building a centralized booking system connecting thousands of vendors with low latency.
rehalaty.solution: Developed a microservices-based infrastructure to ensure stability and massive scalability.
rehalaty.result: 40% increase in booking speed and 60% reduction in operational errors.

xcash.title: XCASH - Digital Finance Infrastructure
xcash.challenge: Providing highly secure payment gateways that comply with international standards.
xcash.solution: Military-grade encryption engineering and multi-layer verification protocols.
xcash.result: Processing over 1 million transactions monthly with 99.99% security uptime.

iedu.title: IEDU - Future of Digital Education
iedu.challenge: Transforming traditional education into an interactive digital experience for thousands of students.
iedu.solution: Integrated LMS with AI-powered performance analytics and virtual classrooms.
iedu.result: 50% improvement in student engagement levels and streamlined staff management.
